def negative_exception_swallowed_before_sentry_or_error_tracker_capture():
    rule_id = "exception_swallowed_before_sentry_or_error_tracker_capture"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Exception re-wrapped before capture_exception, causing Sentry or similar to lose the original traceback."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
